purpose: Combined transcript-only tone readout for the 200-row YouTube Shorts fragrance pool.
scope: Combines hard30 v1 labels, remaining70 labels, and new100 labels into one pool-level view.

labeler.independence_posture: not independent; mixes earlier Codex label artifacts with same-lane new100 labels
labeler.transcript_body_storage: no transcript bodies stored in repo artifacts
